title: acceptance and completion verification standardization
goal: acceptance criteria と test の対応関係を固定し、completion 判定を test pass のみから分離する
constraints: each acceptance item must include test_name
completion pass requires acceptance coverage, checks pass, and allowed_changes compliance
completion fail if any required condition is unsatisfied
must define the completion decision function name and invocation point
must not rely on prose-only completion judgment
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: add acceptance-to-test verification and completion decision guard only
orchestration/run_session.py: add new function evaluate_completion_decision only
orchestration/run_session.py: invoke evaluate_completion_decision before final report completion status is determined
backend/tests/*: verification and completion gate coverage only
forbidden_changes: report format redesign beyond required fields
